sentences.text: Thank you for calling first priority management our business hours are Monday through Friday from eight AM to five PM our office closes for lunch from noon until one PM if you wish to contact someone directly or leave a voicemail by extension please press one for our directory. If this is an emergency please press two. If you know the extension of the person you are calling dial that extension number followed by the pound sign. Please leave a message at the tone and he'll return your call as soon as possible. Thank you. At the tone, please record your message. When you finished recording you may hang up or press one for more options to leave a call back number press five.
